subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath appeared and revealed whatsoever He willeth as a bounty from His presence. Verily, He is the Almighty, the All-Subduing over all who dwell therein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی ظهر و اظهر ما اراد فضلا من عنده انه لهو المقتدر المهیمن علی من فی
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
